text: Mr. Suthesh, 43-year-old male, presented with headaches in two days, breathlessness on exertion and symptoms spain. On examination was found to have elevated blood pressure. Blood investigations were done which showed high HBA1C and lipids. Cardiorephal was sought in your breathlessness in chest pain and advised followed. Patient was stabilized and subsequently treated with anti-hypertensives, IV heparin and supported measures. Patient was monitored for worsening symptoms and complications.
